Production-grade agentic IM bots — Discord, Slack, Telegram, WeChat, Feishu. Plugin system + knowledge base.

items.name: Nanoclaw
items.desc:
Lightweight OpenClaw alternative in Docker sandboxes. WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail.
轻量级 OpenClaw 替代方案，运行在 Docker 沙箱中

items.name: Lobster Guard

AI Agent security gateway — prompt injection detection, content audit, user-ID routing.
AI Agent 安全网关——提示词注入检测、内容审计

items.name: EverMemOS
items.desc:
Long-term memory for 24/7 OpenClaw agents across LLMs and platforms.
24/7 agent 的长期记忆系统，跨 LLM 和平台

items.desc:

自动恢复监控脚本，支持 Telegram 通知

items.desc:
Ultra-lightweight OpenClaw alternative — minimal footprint.

items.desc:
Agentic IM chatbot infrastructure integrating many IM platforms, LLMs, and plugins.

items.desc: Docker version with Chinese IM platforms pre-configured: Feishu, DingTalk, QQ, WeCom.

items.desc: One-click deployment tool for OpenClaw. Simplifies initial setup.

items.desc: 7-day learning course for OpenClaw. Comprehensive Chinese tutorial with daily exercises.

items.name: OpenClaw Use Cases (CN)
items.desc: 40+ real Chinese scenarios: office automation, content creation, server maintenance, knowledge management.

items.name: OpenClaw Nerve
items.desc: Real-time web cockpit: voice conversations, agent kanban, workspace control, sub-agent sessions, usage charts.

items.name: CC Switch
items.desc: Cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw & Gemini CLI.

items.name: 1Panel (OpenClaw Deploy)
items.desc: VPS control panel with one-click OpenClaw deployment. Take full control of your server.

items.name: ZeroClaw
items.desc: Fast, small, fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure — deploy anywhere, swap anything.

items.name: OpenViking
items.desc: Context database for AI Agents — manages memory, resources, skills via filesystem paradigm.

items.name: AionUi
items.desc: Free, local, open-source cowork app for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode and more.

items.name: OpenClaw Skills Archive
items.desc: All versions of all skills on clawhub.com — official archive. Browse skill source code.

items.desc: Chinese official skill library — translated, categorized by scenario, supports Chinese natural language.

items.name: OpenClaw RL
items.desc: Train any agent simply by talking. RL-based agent training through conversation.

items.name: Cherry Studio
items.desc: AI productivity studio with 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs.

items.name: OpenClaw TUI
items.desc: Terminal UI for OpenClaw. Manage agents from your terminal. / 终端界面管理 Agent。

items.desc: Connect OpenClaw to 20+ platforms (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WeChat). / 连接 20+ 平台。

items.desc: Usage analytics dashboard for your OpenClaw instance. Track tokens, costs, and agent activity. / 用量分析仪表盘。

items.name: OpenClaw Cron
items.desc: Schedule tasks for your OpenClaw agent. Cron jobs, one-time reminders, recurring workflows. / 定时任务、提醒、工作流。

items.desc: AI代理编排仪表盘 — 含Cognitive Core（知识图谱 + 修复账本 + 思维流）+ JARVIS视觉 + TTS交互层。基于 Mission Control 二开。/ AI agent orchestration dashboard with Cognitive Core, JARVIS visual overhaul, and TTS integration.

items.name: Obsidian Skills
items.desc:
Teach your agent to use Obsidian — Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and CLI. /
教你的 Agent 使用 Obsidian——Markdown、Bases、JSON Canvas 和 CLI。

items.name: Lobster Workflow Engine
items.desc:
